[Comment]: Not Wednesday Dec 8th,Hi Donna, my name is Dan Saunders and I am the owner/operator of Window & Solar Care. Thanks for selecting me to give you a quote on cleaning your windows. My typical service includes: On the inside; Vacuuming all inside tracks, wipe the sills, clean the inside windows. On the outside; brush the outside tracks, cobweb clean around all window frames, dry brush both sides of the screens and finally clean the outside windows. My pricing is as follows: $5.00/pane (not window) to clean the glass inside and out. $20.00 flat fee to vacuum inside tracks. $20.00 flat fee to dry brush (clean) the screens. $20.00 total for each set of Regular glass sliding doors. French Pane windows or doors are priced at $1.50 per pane. I have limited openings this week and more openings next week if that works for your schedule. Please contact me if I can be of help.
